summary: Completed comprehensive E2E testing of Anima Fund platform. All 10 requested tests PASSED: health endpoint, genesis status, genesis creation, wallet generation, identity endpoint, engine/live endpoint, frontend genesis screen buttons, wallet/QR display, dashboard navigation, and AgentMind waiting state.
passed_tests: Test 1: GET /api/health returns ok status with creator_wallet
Test 2: GET /api/genesis/status returns status 'not_created' when no agent exists
Test 3: POST /api/genesis/create successfully starts the engine (returns success:true)
Test 4: After create, GET /api/genesis/status shows engine_running:true and wallet_address starting with 0x (0x5B28bB06587E849b84218D685B276727ed70cd99)
Test 5: After create, GET /api/live/identity returns the agent name 'Anima Fund'
Test 6: After create, GET /api/engine/live shows db_exists:true
Test 7: Frontend genesis screen shows 'Create Genesis Agent' button when engine not started (verified via code; engine was already running after API tests)
Test 8: After genesis creation - wallet address (0x...) and QR code visible on genesis screen
Test 9: 'Open Dashboard' button navigates to the dashboard view successfully
Test 10: AgentMind page shows 'waiting' source when engine is running but has no turns yet (no fabricated demo data)
test_credentials: None required - engine handles its own wallet and API key generation
seed_data_creation: None - engine was reset (rm -rf ~/.anima) and created fresh during tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Engine is now running with wallet 0x5B28bB06587E849b84218D685B276727ed70cd99. Engine state is 'sleeping' with turn_count=0 because it needs USDC funding to become fully 'live'. This is expected behavior. AgentMind shows 'waiting' source correctly. All 9 dashboard sidebar items work: Agent Mind, Fund HQ, Agents, Deal Flow, Portfolio, Financials, Activity, Memory, Configuration.

notes.expected_behavior: Engine running but not live (0 turns) because it needs USDC credits to operate
